title: oenothera runcinata var. typica
intro: Oenothera runcinata var. typica, also known as the cut-leaved evening primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenothera runcinata var. typica include soothing skin irritations and wounds, reducing anxiety and stress, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its therapeutic benefits.
